system.name: openadapt-compiler
system.description: OpenAdapt record -> compile -> replay with fail-closed effect verification (the reference governed runtime).

note: This is the reference OpenAdapt end-to-end result on the EffectBench MockMed anchor. It is produced by the sibling end-to-end measurement (a real record -> compile -> replay run scored through this benchmark's oracle), NOT by the in-benchmark EffectVerifiedSUT baseline. Until that measurement lands it is a wired placeholder. The shipped effect_verified baseline (results/reference.json) is the mechanism proxy: it reaches SWER 0 by gating success on an independent record readback exactly as the compiled runtime does.

produced_by.harness: openadapt_flow.benchmark.effectbench (in-tree runner) scored through the EffectBench oracle contract

reproducibility.pack_fingerprint: <sha256 of the pack manifest at run time>
